title: Department Manager Vacancy at Woodland Consulting Pvt Ltd - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Woodland Consulting Pvt Ltd - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Woodland Consulting Pvt Ltd! We are hiring a Department Manager for our Vijayawada team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Woodland Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Woodland Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Professional development and training programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Woodland Consulting Pvt Ltd!
